📈 Monitoring & Observability

Application performance, logs and uptime — open source alternatives to Datadog and New Relic.

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Alternatives to Datadog

Infrastructure and application monitoring.

Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Prometheus + Grafana

Open source metrics collection and dashboards.

License: Apache-2.0 / AGPL-3.0 (Grafana) Self-host: ★★★☆☆

SigNoz

Open source Datadog alternative — metrics, traces and logs in one.

License: Apache-2.0 (community) / commercial (cloud) Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Uptime Kuma

Self-hosted uptime monitor — Pingdom alternative.

License: MIT Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆
